fragility_points: A reputable final consensus centered exactly at $0.76 would weaken the thesis.
Timing slippage or omitted GAAP EPS would shift the case toward mechanics risk.
One-cent rounding and non-operating items can decide the outcome.
key_assumptions: Netflix reports on normal mid-April cadence with an official earnings document available for settlement.
Reported diluted GAAP EPS lands above rather than exactly at the prior $0.76 guide.
No release-format or accounting wrinkle creates fallback-source ambiguity.
main_logical_chain: The only catalyst with major information value before resolution is Netflix's official earnings release.
Historical SEC filing cadence makes that release likely to occur on normal schedule.
Business momentum supports a pro-Yes lean, but the prior official guide at exactly $0.76 keeps exact-print risk material.
Therefore Yes is more likely than No, but not at the market's 94.5% confidence.
main_thesis: The April earnings release is the dominant catalyst and still leans Yes, but the market is too confident because Netflix's prior official Q1 guide exactly matched the $0.76 strike.
quote_anchors: Yes only if GAAP EPS is greater than $0.76
source_quality_view: Primary SEC sources are strong for timing and guidance; contextual consensus sources are weaker and partly overlapping, so pre-release confidence should stay below near-certainty.
strongest_disconfirmers: The contract requires strictly greater than $0.76, so an exact in-line print resolves No.
Netflix's own last official Q1 guide was exactly equal to the strike.
Independent pre-release consensus triangulation was degraded, limiting confidence in an extreme Yes price.
strongest_supports: SEC-filed January shareholder letter showed strong backdrop and Q1 diluted EPS guidance at $0.76.
SEC EDGAR cadence suggests the decisive earnings catalyst arrives on schedule in mid-April.
Contextual estimate sources did not clearly point below the strike.
timing_relevance: The market's residual uncertainty is concentrated in one imminent catalyst: the official Netflix earnings release expected around 2026-04-16.
unresolved_ambiguities: Exact final pre-release consensus immediately before earnings.
Exact release timestamp relative to market close.
How much upside versus January guide is already embedded in the price.
what_would_change_view: A clean reputable consensus clearly above $0.76 or an official upside signal would move me higher; evidence centering the print at $0.76, timing slippage, or release-format ambiguity would move me lower.
